openingQuery: What goes well with the pour-over set?

chat.content: What goes well with the pour-over set?

The Ceramic Tumblers ($78) are the natural companion to the Stoneware Pour-Over Set: same kiln register, same charcoal undertone, and no two pieces quite match. Add the Woven Mat Set ($42) if you want the table to feel intentional rather than assembled.

toolCalls.description: Resolve Stoneware Pour-Over Set as anchor product
toolCalls.sql:
SELECT product_id, name, brand, price
FROM product_catalog
WHERE name ILIKE '%Stoneware Pour-Over Set%'
  AND quantity > 0
LIMIT 1;
toolCalls.resultSummary: Anchor product resolved: Stoneware Pour-Over Set

toolCalls.description: Product-to-product pgvector similarity from Stoneware Pour-Over Set
toolCalls.sql:
SELECT p2.name, p2.price, 1 - (p1.embedding <=> p2.embedding) AS similarity
FROM product_catalog p1
JOIN product_catalog p2 ON p2.product_id != p1.product_id
WHERE p1.name ILIKE '%Stoneware Pour-Over Set%'
  AND p2.quantity > 0
ORDER BY p1.embedding <=> p2.embedding
LIMIT 5;
toolCalls.resultSummary: Ceramic Tumblers and Woven Mat Set ranked as closest companions

memoryPills.content: Pairing the pour-over set with companion pieces
Stoneware, hand-thrown, slow-living tags; tactile materials
Bought Stoneware Pour-Over Set 22d ago; anchor product for this pairing

telemetry.sql: SELECT event_type, content, ts FROM customer_episodic_seed WHERE customer_id = $1 ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 10;

sections.title: The companion move
paragraphs: Theo's second turn demonstrates product-to-product similarity: resolve the anchor, then ask pgvector for neighbors that share material, use, and visual register.
